name: completedOrderMustExposeTrackingReference()
description:
Orders reaching the COMPLETED state must expose a shipment tracking
reference. Missing tracking data indicates a product defect.
descriptionHtml:
Orders reaching the COMPLETED state must expose a shipment tracking
reference. Missing tracking data indicates a product defect.
